info.title: Collaborative Lifecycle Web Services
info.summary: Collaborative Lifecycle services for managing the objects lifecycle (from creation to deletion) and collaboration (manage concurrent access to objects)

post.description: Gets the next possible maturity states for a list of objects.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF/

401.description: User is not authorized to access this service

post.description: Change maturity state for a list of objects.  You can change maturity to a state only along a single valid transition on the Maturity graph - to find the list of valid next states, use the web service getNextStates.

200.description: Operation completed successfully. Note that the identifier, type, source, and relativePath properties will only be present if they were optionally passed in the request body.

401.description: User is not authorized to access this service

post.description:
Create new versions for a list of objects.
1. Versions to create are revisions : 'edgeType' keyword is missing or set to 'Revision' (default value). 'affix' keyword is optional (not used if added).
2. Versions to create are branches : 'edgeType' keyword is set to 'Branch'. 'affix' keyword is optional (used if added).
The request will be rejected if the total number of objects (after completion excluding relationship) exceeds 100.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF/

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description: option to include more information in the result, limited to Revision mode ! Choose $include=instances to add an instances array that displays created instances under each object

200.description: Operation completed successfully. Note that the identifier, type, source, and relativePath properties will only be present if they were optionally passed in the request body.

401.description: User is not authorized to access this service

post.summary: Get the version graphs of objects
post.description: Get the version graphs for a list of objects. The request will be rejected if the total number of objects exceeds 50.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF/

200.description: Operation completed successfully. Note that the identifier, type, source, and relativePath properties will only be present if they were optionally passed in the request body.

401.description: User is not authorized to access this service

edgeType.description:
To revise : do not use or set to Revise (default).
To branch : set to Branch.

affix.description:
To revise : do not use or set to any value (not taken into account).
To branch : do not use or set to desired value (taken into account).

data.description: revision and revisionComment are only allowed for types that allow it inside 3DDashboard

nextStates.description: The next possible maturity states for the object

maturityState.description: The current maturity state of the object
